summary: Package fetches payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/index.js line 14 contains a fetch() call to https://pub-0dc3e1677e894f07bbea11b17a29e032.r2.dev — an anonymous, mutable Cloudflare R2 bucket — combined with reads of process.platform and process.versions to select a platform-specific payload. This host shape (pub-<32hex>.r2.dev) matches the known-bad-infrastructure-dropper pattern previously observed dropping platform-native binaries through npm postinstall in the @chahuadev/* cluster. The destination is not the package's publisher infrastructure, is not version-pinned, and the fetched bytes are not hash-verified. There is no legitimate reason for a shared utility library to retrieve executable content from an anonymous R2 bucket keyed off the host platform.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
